response.original_title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | October 7, 2022
response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents King Gizzard & The Wizard Lizard performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded October 7, 2022.  Songs: Ice V Iron Lung Magma  Stu Mackenzie - Guitar / Vocals Joey Walker - Guitar / Vocals Ambrose Kenny-Smith - Saxophone / Keyboards / Vocals Nicholas “Cookie” Craig - Guitar / Keyboards Lucas Harwood - Bass Michael “Cavs” Cavanagh - Drums  Host: Cheryl Waters KEXP Audio Engineers: Julian Martlew & Jon Roberts Guest Audio Engineers: Sam Joseph, Joe Santarpia & Nico Wilson Audio Mix: Stu Mackenzie Audio Mastering: Kevin Suggs Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Carlos Cruz, Scott Holpainen, Matt Ogaz & Kendall Rock Editor: Scott Holpainen
response.title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | October 7, 2022
